arts.ttl: Leeds United can lay ghost to rest as Farke toils on 11th-hour knocks at Preston
arts.sum: Leeds United visit Preston North End in a 12.30pm kick-off at Deepdale today, with the chance to climb back to the top of the Championship. Gnonto did not start last Saturday and only got 69 minutes on Tuesday, so he is unlikely to have any issues with going again today.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Sam Greenwood impressing at Preston
arts.sum: Leeds United attacking midfielder Sam Greenwood has had a solid start to life in Preston colours following his loan move in the summer. How much he’d cost is difficult to speculate, but Leeds did insert a £1.5million buy option in his Middlesbrough loan deal last season, indicating the 49ers are happy to just break even on the attacking midfielder that is contracted until 2026.

arts.ttl: Myth of Leeds United's battle against Sheffield United exposed by Championship statement
arts.sum: As two of the big hitters in the Championship Leeds and Sheffield United are expected to be challenging head-to-had for the Premier League promotion prize at stake, but as Farke was swift to point out when asked about that battle, they are not the only ones. With a tiny gap threatening to open up a the top of the Championship table, Leeds United boss Daniel Farke was asked this week about the emerging possibility of a see-saw battle with Sheffield United for top spot in the table.

arts.ttl: Leeds United stance on losing €15m asset for free and feeling they hold key cards
arts.sum: Losing Junior Firpo for free in 19 days is a possibility Leeds United are not ignoring, but Daniel Farke has no interest in drafting up new contracts for fear of losing a player. Leeds could, of course, offer him a new deal of their own, but Farke says there has been no time to discuss this with the Dominican, who must put all of his energy into recovering from his hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Leeds United must sound out Manchester United or Brighton if Euro club poach starter
arts.sum: Leeds United might face interest from Rennes for goalkeeper Illan Meslier during the January window, and if that materialises with a move, a replacement is needed. Should Glen Kamara’s club pursue Meslier, Leeds have to be alert to replacement opportunities in January, and here, we look at two Premier League options…

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Preston with defensive issues to address
arts.sum: Leeds will take a strong squad to face Preston North End today, but Farke admits he has some decisions to make over who will start. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: How to watch Preston vs Leeds United - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Another day, another Leeds United fixture which will be played out under the scrutiny of the TV cameras. The game gets under way at 12.30pm today, Saturday, December 14, 2024, at Preston's Deepdale Stadium.

arts.ttl: Leeds United line-up vs Preston as forwards fall short plus full-back reshuffle
arts.sum: Understandably, Daniel Farke was not able to give definitive answers on several Leeds United players with another training session to go before tomorrow’s Preston North End clash. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Paul Heckingbottom's Leeds United claim misses the point as Whites fact ignored
arts.sum: The ex-Whites boss is frustrated a Wednesday night fixture away in Cardiff for his team is followed by a 12:30pm Saturday lunchtime game, giving Preston little time to prepare for the match. Preston North End manager Paul Heckingbottom has hit out at the scheduling that sees his side have a day less preparation for their early kick-off with Leeds United .

arts.ttl: Preston v Leeds: Team news, Sky Sports update, referee confirmed
arts.sum: Up next is a fixture that presented issues for Daniel Farke last season, a trip to Deepdale to take on Preston. Leeds United take on Preston North End away from home this weekend looking to make it three wins on the bounce to remain the top two.
